mapper.select: SELECT menu_idx AS menuIdx, shopcode AS shopCode, category, menu_name AS menuName, price, currency, image_path AS imagePath, description FROM MST_menu_info WHERE shopcode = #{shopCode} ORDER BY category, menu_idx DESC

SELECT m.menu_idx AS menuIdx, m.shopcode AS shopCode, m.category, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.price, m.currency, m.image_path AS imagePath, m.description, d.ingredients FROM MST_menu_info m LEFT JOIN DTL_menu_info d ON m.menu_idx = d.menu_idx AND m.shopcode = d.shopcode WHERE m.menu_idx = #{menuIdx} AND m.shopcode = #{shopCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST_menu_info ( shopcode, category, menu_name, price, currency, image_path, description, reg_user, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{shopCode}, #{category}, #{menuName}, #{price}, #{currency}, #{imagePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regUser}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO DTL_menu_info ( menu_idx, shopcode, ingredients, reg_user, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{menuIdx}, #{shopCode}, #{ingredients, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regUser}, NOW() )
